title: Blue Highlight Button
description: Bring back the old Blue highlight button without Programmer Art
body:
Before 1.15, the button highlight was like this and now we only have a white outline, while reading the internet i found out that many people where complaining about this change, in particular colorblind people. i made this pack so you don't have to use Programmer Art

If you use Fabric, i suggest you to use this pack alongside [YellowText](https://modrinth.com/mod/yellowtext) for a better experience

Probably for some reasons updates will come to this pack
